results.title: What to know about rare visit by China's Xi to North Korea for talks with Kim Jong Un
results.description: China, the North's economic pipeline, is expected to reassert its influence over a traditionally allied government that has grown closer to Russia in recent times.

results.title: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma outlines growth vision: “My ambition is to make Xbox the number one gaming... - Moneycontrol.com
results.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma outlines growth vision: “My ambition is to make Xbox the number one gaming... Moneycontrol.com Asha Sharma commits to "resetting" Xbox, prioritising exclusivity and addressing AI in new strategy GamesIndustry.biz Xbox CEO says "we have to reset the business" to "be where the world plays" Yahoo Finance New Xbox CEO Looking At ‘Each Title’ For Exclusivity, Back To Where It Started Forbes "My mandate is not 30% accountability margins": Xbox's CEO says the aim is to be number one Windows Central

results.title: All tourists urged to avoid common packing error as it can 'ruin holidays'
results.description: Tourists have been urged to avoid making a common packing error as it can lead to holidays being "ruined". There's some key advice you need to know before heading off on your travels

results.title: Israeli strike martyrs 7 in Gaza City including two women
results.description: GAZA - An Israeli strike in Gaza killed at least seven Palestinians, including two women in Gaza on early Saturday, according to health officials in the Strip.

results.title: Soldier among two martyred in Landi Kotal gun attack
results.description: KHYBER - Two individuals were martyred in a shooting incident involving unidentified assailants in the Sultan Khel Kunj Ground area of Landi Kotal.

results.title: Man held for murdering teen daughter of live-in partner in Punjab
results.description: A 23-year-old man in Punjab was arrested for allegedly strangling his live-in partner’s 16-year-old daughter, concealing the body in a suitcase, and burning it in a forested area of SBS Nagar. Police traced him through CCTV footage and recovered the charred remains

results.title: St. John’s season on the brink after getting shut out by Alabama, ace Tyler Fay
results.description: The start to St. John’s first trip to the Super Regionals in 14 years didn’t go as planned.

results.title: Kosovo voters return to the polls after parties fail to agree on a new president
results.description: PRISTINA, Kosovo (AP) — Voters in Kosovo headed to the polls Sunday for an early parliamentary election, the third in 18 months, in an attempt to unlock a political impasse in the small Balkan nation that is striving to join the European Union and NATO.

results.title: Kosovo voters return to the polls after parties fail to agree on a new president
results.description: Voters in Kosovo head to the polls for an early parliamentary election. This is the third election in 18 months, aimed at resolving a political impasse. The main political parties failed to agree on a new president by a March...
